name: R-Dson-pi-codebase
description: A fast, lightweight codebase indexing and search extension for pi-coding-agent. It provides instant symbol navigation, incremental re-indexing via content hashing, and powerful reference search (leveraging ripgrep/grep), and zero runtime dependencies.
